description: Style Note Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leatherette handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality. Product Details Dark green handbag made of leather with decorative metal belts on the side Has two short handles so that you can sling it on your shoulders or hang it from your wrist One main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and organiser sleeves Metal feet on base Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Size Height: 24 cm Width: 37 cm Depth: 9 cm
